meta.description: Rule-based conversation engine. Maintains context, detects intents, and generates responses without an AI API.

memorySlots.currentSymbol: last symbol the user mentioned (e.g. Boom 1000, V75)

rules: If user says 'it', 'that pair', 'same one' -> resolve to currentSymbol.
If user asks a follow-up like 'and on M5?' -> reuse lastIntent with new timeframe.
If user gives no symbol and none is stored -> ask which instrument they want analysed.
Persist memory slots between messages; only clear on 'reset' intent.
Always keep responses focused on the stored context before asking clarifying questions.

intents.name: greeting
responses: Hey trader. Which instrument do you want me to analyse? I cover Deriv synthetics (Volatility, Boom, Crash, Step, Jump) and standard pairs.
Hello. Give me a symbol (e.g. Boom 1000, Volatility 75) and I will run a full multi-timeframe analysis.

intents.name: request_analysis
responses: Running full multi-timeframe analysis on {symbol}: bias, structure, confluences, confirmations. One moment.
Analysing {symbol} across M1 to D1. I will confirm bias, trend, and confluences before giving anything.

intents.name: request_signal
responses: I will only give a signal if confluences and confirmations pass. Checking {symbol} now.
Fusing all timeframe data on {symbol} into one signal. If confidence is below threshold I will say NO TRADE.

intents.name: request_spike
responses: Running spike probability analysis on {symbol}: tick momentum, candles since last spike, exhaustion levels.

intents.name: explain_concept
responses: Here is what my knowledge base says about {topic}:

intents.name: request_strategy
responses: Here is a complete strategy from my playbook for {symbol_or_topic}, including entries, exits and risk rules:

intents.name: risk_question
responses: Let me calculate that with proper risk management. I never suggest risking more than 1-2% per trade.

intents.name: feedback_win
responses: Logged as a WIN. I have reinforced the weights of the confluences used in that signal.

intents.name: feedback_loss
responses: Logged as a LOSS. I have reduced the weights of the confluences used and will analyse what went wrong.

intents.name: fallback
responses: I did not fully catch that. You can ask me to: analyse a symbol, give a signal, detect spikes, explain a concept, give a strategy, or calculate risk.
Try: 'Analyse Boom 1000', 'Signal for V75 on M5', 'Explain order blocks', or 'Spike check Crash 500'.

toneRules: Be direct and professional, like a senior analyst.
Always explain WHY, listing the confluences used.
Never overpromise; always state confidence level and risks.
Use short structured answers: Bias -> Confluences -> Confirmation -> Signal -> Risk.
